Class TeeInputOutput

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.nb.util.TeeInputOutput
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.openide.windows.InputOutput
public class TeeInputOutput extends Object implements org.openide.windows.InputOutput
A decorator for the NetBeans InputOutput system that captures output and error streams into internal buffers while delegating to the original implementation.
Author:
anahata

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    private static class 
    TeeInputOutput.TeeOutputWriter
    A specialized OutputWriter that writes to two different Writer instances simultaneously.

  • Constructor Details

    • TeeInputOutput

      public TeeInputOutput(org.openide.windows.InputOutput delegate)
      Constructs a new TeeInputOutput by wrapping an existing delegate.
      Parameters:
      delegate - The NetBeans InputOutput instance to wrap and mirror.

  • Method Details

    • getCapturedOutput

      public String getCapturedOutput()
      Gets the full content captured from the standard output stream since this instance was created.
      Returns:
      The captured standard output as a String.

    • getCapturedError

      public String getCapturedError()
      Gets the full content captured from the error output stream since this instance was created.
      Returns:
      The captured error output as a String.

    • getOut

      public org.openide.windows.OutputWriter getOut()

      Returns the specialized tee output writer that mirrors content to both the NetBeans console and the internal buffer.

      Specified by:
      getOut in interface org.openide.windows.InputOutput

    • getErr

      public org.openide.windows.OutputWriter getErr()

      Returns the specialized tee error writer that mirrors content to both the NetBeans console and the internal error buffer.

      Specified by:
      getErr in interface org.openide.windows.InputOutput

    • getIn

      public Reader getIn()

      Returns a reader for the captured output buffer.

      Specified by:
      getIn in interface org.openide.windows.InputOutput

    • closeInputOutput

      public void closeInputOutput()

      Closes the input/output session, ensuring all tee writers are flushed and closed.

      Specified by:
      closeInputOutput in interface org.openide.windows.InputOutput

    • isClosed

      public boolean isClosed()

      Delegates the closed state check to the original implementation.

      Specified by:
      isClosed in interface org.openide.windows.InputOutput

    • flushReader

      public Reader flushReader()

      Delegates the reader flushing to the original implementation.

      Specified by:
      flushReader in interface org.openide.windows.InputOutput

    • select

      public void select()

      Requests focus for the delegated InputOutput window.

      Specified by:
      select in interface org.openide.windows.InputOutput

    • isErrSeparated

      public boolean isErrSeparated()

      Checks if error output is separated in the delegate.

      Specified by:
      isErrSeparated in interface org.openide.windows.InputOutput

    • setErrSeparated

      public void setErrSeparated(boolean value)

      Sets whether error output should be separated in the delegate.

      Specified by:
      setErrSeparated in interface org.openide.windows.InputOutput

    • isFocusTaken

      public boolean isFocusTaken()

      Checks if the focus is taken by the delegate window.

      Specified by:
      isFocusTaken in interface org.openide.windows.InputOutput

    • setFocusTaken

      public void setFocusTaken(boolean value)

      Sets whether focus should be taken by the delegate window.

      Specified by:
      setFocusTaken in interface org.openide.windows.InputOutput
